title: Building a Retention-First Editing System
author: BlobbyOfficial
lede: Most creators don’t need more effects. They need **clearer decisions** that control curiosity and payoff.

blocks.content: This framework is designed around intent: hook, context, escalation, payoff.

blocks.caption: A high-performing opening stays clear before it gets fancy.

blocks.content: Use velocity changes intentionally: fast cuts establish momentum, then strategic pauses reset attention and build contrast.
Retention comes from clarity and curiosity, not chaos.

blocks.title: Pro move
blocks.content: Add a *micro-open-loop* every 20-35 seconds by previewing what comes next.

items: YouTube audience retention graph review, internal sample set (Q1)
Competitive study: top 20 shorts in niche
